text:
Created attachment 148848
Proposed patch (since 367888 revision)

Patch to update games/freedroidrpg port from 0.15 to 0.15.1 version.

Look following link for changes:
http://sourceforge.net/projects/freedroid/files/freedroidRPG/freedroidRPG-0.15/

- Added license information
- Added desktop entry
- Changed USE_GL value from "yes" to "gl"
